Now I have enough information to create a plan. I need to:
1. Find Drammen municipality (kommunenummer or kommunenavn)
2. Get parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m²
3. Get 200-year flood zones (gjentaksintervall = 200)
4. Intersect parcels with flood zones
5. Sort by parcel area descending and limit to 10

1. Get Drammen municipality geometry
2. Get parcels in Drammen (using spatial join instead of kommunenummer filter)
3. Filter parcels > 5000 m²

5. Spatial join parcels with flood zones
6. Sort by area descending
7. Limit to 10
